title: cyanthillium cinereum
intro: Cyanthillium cinereum is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in Africa and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Cyanthillium cinereum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
